decisions.matched_standard: Acoustic ceilings in open-plan office areas
decisions.how: decider matched 'Acoustic ceilings in open-plan office areas' for Ceilings; room fit 'match'
decisions.why: Selected Northwind Fissured 600 for its high NRC (0.85), Class A fire rating, high humidity resistance, and firm-preferred status for open offices.
honors_lessons: Standardized on high NRC (>=0.80) Class A tiles
Avoid anything below 0.75 NRC in open offices
HumiGuard-equivalent humidity resistance required near rooftop units
